# UrbanBreathe
> AI-powered Smart City Air Quality Decision Intelligence Platform

## About
UrbanBreathe transforms raw air quality data into actionable environmental intelligence for Smart City Command Centres, Municipal Corporations, and Pollution Control Boards.

**Live URL:** https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app  
**Status:** ET AI Hackathon 2.0 prototype

## Core Modules

1. **Live Monitoring** — Real-time AQI dashboard with PM2.5, PM10, NO₂, O₃, SO₂, CO readings, weather conditions, interactive AQI gauge, and anomaly detection.
2. **Source Attribution** — Explainable AI engine estimating pollution source contributions (traffic, industry, biomass, dust) with confidence scores.
3. **Predictive Intelligence** — 72-hour AQI forecast using diurnal cycle modeling with confidence bands and hourly breakdown.
4. **Policy Simulator** — Test 8 policy interventions with before/after comparison on AQI, PM2.5, hospital admissions, and cost.
5. **Executive Brief** — Government-ready situational report generator with print/PDF export.
6. **Citizen Advisory** — Multilingual health advisories (English, Hindi, Bengali, Telugu) with precautions and emergency contacts.

## Data Sources
- **Live:** Open-Meteo API (free, no key required)
- **Fallback:** Curated dataset for 10 Indian cities when API is unavailable
- **Coverage:** Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Lucknow, Ahmedabad, Patna

## API Endpoints
All endpoints served at `/api/` (proxy to Express backend):
- `GET /api/cities` — List all monitored cities
- `GET /api/air-quality/:cityId?lat=&lon=` — Live AQI and weather data
- `GET /api/sources/:cityId` — AI source attribution
- `GET /api/forecast/:cityId` — 72-hour forecast
- `GET /api/simulation/interventions` — Available policy interventions
- `POST /api/simulation/run` — Run policy simulation
- `POST /api/brief/generate` — Generate executive brief
- `GET /api/advisory/:cityId` — Citizen health advisory
